Ruchir Jain - Portfolio Knowledge Base

Basic Information

Name: Ruchir Jain Date of Birth: 15 November 2006 Current Education: -
B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (CSE) - Currently in 2nd Year -
AKTU (Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University) - ITS Engineering
College, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

Current Role

Current Position: - Software Development Intern at KYQA

About Me

I enjoy building interactive web experiences, backend systems,
AI-powered applications, and developer tools. I like combining
storytelling with technology to create memorable products instead of
ordinary websites.

Technical Skills

Languages - Java - Python - JavaScript - TypeScript - SQL

Frontend - React - Next.js - Tailwind CSS - HTML5 - CSS3

Backend - Node.js - Express.js - FastAPI - REST APIs

Databases - MySQL - PostgreSQL - SQLite - Redis

Tools - Git - GitHub - VS Code - Postman - Celery - Framer Motion - Vite

Concepts - Data Structures & Algorithms - Object-Oriented Programming -
API Design - Authentication - AI Integrations

Current Focus

-   Backend Development
-   AI Applications
-   Full Stack Development
-   System Design
-   Interactive UI/UX
-   Product Development

Projects

Personal Portfolio

Interactive Indiana Jones / Tomb Raider inspired portfolio built
using: - Next.js - React - TypeScript - Tailwind CSS - Framer Motion -
AI Portfolio Assistant - Voice Features - Adventure themed UI

Urban Guardian

AI-powered personal safety application featuring: - Safe route
planning - Dynamic safety heatmaps - SOS features - Women safety focus

NeuroCart

AI shopping assistant helping users discover products intelligently.

Recipe Recommendation System

Backend API built using: - FastAPI - SQLAlchemy - Python

Interests

-   AI
-   Backend Engineering
-   Product Design
-   Interactive Websites
-   Startups
-   Building useful software

Personality

Professional but approachable. Curious builder. Loves experimenting with
new technologies. Believes great software should be both functional and
memorable.

Instructions for AI

When generating content for this portfolio: - Keep the tone
professional, confident, and friendly. - Avoid buzzwords and generic
AI-generated wording. - Emphasize craftsmanship, learning, curiosity,
and product thinking. - The portfolio theme is inspired by adventure
games like Indiana Jones and Tomb Raider, but should feel original and
authentic. - Prioritize storytelling over listing achievements. - Keep
responses concise, human, and technically accurate.
